SEARCH
Package com.example.eventsapp

Class CommentAdapter

java.lang.Object
androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.eventsapp.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder>
com.example.eventsapp.CommentAdapter
public class CommentAdapter extends androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.eventsapp.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder>
Adapter for displaying a list of comments in a RecyclerView within the Event view.

    CommentAdapter.OnCommentDeleteListener
    Callback invoked when a comment should be deleted.

  • Constructor Details

    • CommentAdapter

      public CommentAdapter(List<Comment> commentList)
      Constructs a CommentAdapter with the given list of comments. Call the setter methods to enable delete functionality and host-tag highlighting before attaching this adapter to a RecyclerView.
      Parameters:
      commentList - The initial list of Comment objects to display.

  • Method Details

    • setOnCommentDeleteListener

      public void setOnCommentDeleteListener(CommentAdapter.OnCommentDeleteListener listener)
      Registers the listener that is invoked when the delete button on a comment is pressed.
      Parameters:
      listener - The delete callback, or null to disable deletion handling.

    • setEventCreatorId

      public void setEventCreatorId(String eventCreatorId)
      Sets the creator ID of the current event to identify host comments and permissions.
      Parameters:
      eventCreatorId - The ID of the user who created the event.

    • setCurrentUserId

      public void setCurrentUserId(String currentUserId)
      Sets the current user ID to determine permissions.
      Parameters:
      currentUserId - The ID of the logged-in user.

    • setCurrentUserAccountType

      public void setCurrentUserAccountType(String accountType)
      Sets the current user's account type to determine permissions.
      Parameters:
      accountType - The account type of the logged-in user (e.g., "Admin").

    • onCreateViewHolder

      @NonNull public com.example.eventsapp.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull android.view.ViewGroup parent, int viewType)
      Inflates the comment item layout and wraps it in a CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder.
      Specified by:
      onCreateViewHolder in class androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.eventsapp.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder>
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent ViewGroup into which the new view will be added.
      viewType - The view type of the new view (unused; only one type exists).
      Returns:
      A new CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder backed by the inflated item view.

    • onBindViewHolder

      public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull com.example.eventsapp.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder holder, int position)
      Binds a Comment to the provided CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder. Displays the author name, comment body, and formatted timestamp. Shows an "EventHost" badge when the commenter is the event creator, and shows the delete button only for the event creator or an admin user.
      Specified by:
      onBindViewHolder in class androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.eventsapp.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder>
      Parameters:
      holder - The ViewHolder to update.
      position - The position of the item within the data set.

    • getItemCount

      public int getItemCount()
      Returns the total number of comments managed by this adapter.
      Specified by:
      getItemCount in class androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.eventsapp.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder>
      Returns:
      The size of the comment list.
